description: SPIRAL-D256-K4-P2 — second pass of the spiral curriculum. Loads spiral_d256_k4_p1_seed.safetensors (gate_warmup_diagnostic_100k step-15K, no cursor). Data resets to position 0 (no cursor sidecar). Sees 40K steps: first 15K repeat P1 material (warm weights meet familiar data), next 25K are new. Step counter continues from 15K → 55K. No scaffold, no clamps — raw gradient signal only. eval_every=512 aligns with LCM(64,512) so every eval captures L2/L3 firings. Task: task_fd444d. Registry: task_a5d641. Related: task_39914e (staged curriculum design).
notes: Loads spiral_d256_k4_p1_seed.safetensors — copy of gate_warmup_diagnostic_100k_step15000.safetensors with NO cursor sidecar. Absent sidecar resets data to position 0. Step-20K checkpoint was never saved: gate_warmup_falsification fired at step 20K (L2 θ=0.00145 < 0.005, L3 θ=0.00050 < 0.001) and raised RuntimeError before the save. Step-15K is the last viable checkpoint. Data exposure history: P1 = gate_warmup_diagnostic_100k steps 0-15K. P2 = this run, steps 15K-55K (40K new steps, first 15K repeat P1 data). S=15K chosen at L2/L0 inflection (steps 14-16K in P1 cold run). Linear growth: each pass adds S=15K new steps.
